{{Quote|I have thought a great deal about what I wish to leave behind. Gala needs to be a democracy. The people have asked for it, and I have granted it as my last act as Queen. That will be my legacy.|Veda|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]''</ref>}}
'''Veda''' was the [[Queen/Legends|queen]] of [[Gala]], and the mother of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Beju]].

==Biography==
Veda had been married to [[King/Legends|King]] [[Cana]] who had died, and she was the only ruler of [[Galu]] and the rest of Gala. Veda was being poisoned by [[Jono Dunn]], Beju, and [[Lonnag Giba|Giba]], who served the family in the palace. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] told the queen that she was being poisoned, and she understood because she had been dying. Her night-time tea was being poisoned. When Beju learned that [[Elan Tallah|Elan]] had the Mark of the Crown, and not him, he stepped out of the election. [[Wila Prammi]] was elected Governor, and Veda went on with her life with her son.
